message:
Running command: # amuxbus is NOT in the DEF template (0 occurrences). 
# This is the root cause of GPL-0326 - ports in wrapper.v not in DEF template.
# We need to remove amuxbus from wrapper.v port list before running PnR.
# Use python to do the surgical removal

python3 /tmp/remove_amuxbus.py 2>/dev/null || echo "Script not found, will create it"
